name: Consumer Credit Counseling Services
description_short: Springfield, OH's Consumer Credit Counseling Services at 27 N Wittenberg Ave offers free credit counseling and debt management to local residents.
description_long:
Consumer Credit Counseling Services is located at 27 N Wittenberg Ave in Springfield, OH. This standalone office operates Monday through Friday, with extended evening hours on Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday until 8PM. The center is closed on weekends, making it convenient for Springfield working professionals to schedule appointments before or after work.

At this Springfield location, certified credit counselors provide free financial assessments, debt management planning, and budget counseling to residents of OH and surrounding areas. Services are confidential and designed specifically for individuals facing credit challenges. Call the center at (937) 325-2898 to schedule your free consultation or discuss your financial situation with a local counselor.

If you're a Springfield resident struggling with credit card debt, student loans, or other financial obligations, this location provides no-cost guidance to help you regain control. Bring recent statements and documentation of your debts to your appointment. Consumer Credit Counseling Services is a trusted nonprofit resource for families in Springfield seeking legitimate credit help.
pros: Completely free credit counseling sessions with no service fees
Certified credit counselors conduct personalized financial reviews
Four-step structured process from assessment through ongoing support
Often negotiates lower interest rates directly with creditors
Provides budgeting tools, debt tracking resources, and educational materials
Can help consolidate multiple credit card payments into single monthly payment
cons: Effectiveness depends entirely on client's ability to make full, on-time payments on negotiated plans
Cannot stop legal action or collection calls without sustained payment performance; only claims to 'often reduce' them
Cannot provide legal advice, requiring clients to seek attorneys separately for legal matters
Website contains two different phone numbers for scheduling, suggesting possible operational inconsistencies
No transparent information about success rates, average debt reduction amounts, or client outcomes
best_for: Consumers with multiple credit card debts seeking consolidation into single manageable payment
People struggling to manage debt who want free expert guidance before considering debt settlement or bankruptcy
Individuals wanting to improve credit scores and understand credit management fundamentals
Spanish-speaking consumers needing bilingual financial counseling
diagnosis: CCCS is best for consumers with manageable debt levels who need expert guidance on budgeting and debt repayment strategy and can commit to full, on-time payments. The primary caveat is that their effectiveness depends entirely on client payment discipline—they cannot force creditors to accept settlements or stop collection efforts without consistent payments, and they explicitly cannot provide legal assistance for clients facing active litigation.
services: Free credit card debt review and budget consultation
Personalized debt repayment and relief plan creation
Debt consolidation coordination (multiple payments into one)
Budgeting tools and debt tracking resources
Financial education and credit management guidance
Collection call and legal action reduction assistance
Educational blog content on credit topics
meta_description: Consumer Credit Counseling Services at 27 N Wittenberg Ave, Springfield, OH. Free credit counseling and debt management planning.
